approvalNote: Peter exported selected assets on 2026-06-15, asked to stick with Lily for Field Relay, supplied the AI Developer School line 'The new programming language is human language', and revised the Field Relay pirate concept. Previous instruction says not to worry about ElevenLabs credits because time is the enemy.

narrator_lily.role: Default proven narrator from existing AdLib adverts; calm, warm, lightly aspirational

takes.speaker: advert_voice
takes.text:
Your hands are on the wing. Your head is in the wind.

Field Relay is a talkable assistant for session notes, kit checks, repairs, and ideas you do not want to lose.

Not a safety system. A field computer for busy hands.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to fieldrelay.continuumkit.org.
takes.title: Field Relay - Water Sports 15s

takes.speaker: advert_voice
takes.text:
Some jobs do not wait while you unlock a laptop.

Field Relay is for people whose hands and eyes are busy: a talkable notebook, checklist, command line, and tool launcher for the real world.

Save the note. Start the capture. Run the checklist. Call the tool. Let your own agent pick up the work.

Field Relay.

A tricorder you can talk to.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to fieldrelay.continuumkit.org.
takes.title: Field Relay - Hands Free 30s

takes.speaker: advert_voice
takes.text:
The best farm note is usually made nowhere near a desk.

Field Relay is a talkable assistant for land work: notes, reminders, checklists, photos, repairs, places, and jobs to send back to your agent.

Gate needs fixing. Pump sounded wrong. Move the trough. Check that field again on Thursday.

Say it while the work is still in front of you.

Field Relay.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to fieldrelay.continuumkit.org.
takes.title: Field Relay - Farmer's Assistant 30s

takes.speaker: advert_voice
takes.text:
That captain is amazing.

He can remember where he has hidden his treasure, even though he has got two hooks and two eye patches.

Aye. That is because he uses Field Relay.

There she blows! Avast!

Field Relay: notes and commands for crews with busy hands.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to fieldrelay.continuumkit.org.
takes.title: Field Relay - Pirate Crew 20s

takes.speaker: advert_voice
takes.text:
Some people call it multitasking. Some people call it Tuesday.

Packed lunch. Wet kit. Lost form. Football boots. Dentist. Birthday present. That one thing you remembered in the car and lost by the time you got home.

Field Relay is a talkable assistant for busy hands, busy eyes, and brains already doing too much.

Say it. Save it. Send it to the right list.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to fieldrelay.continuumkit.org.
takes.title: Field Relay - Mums 30s

takes.speaker: advert_voice
takes.text:
The new programming language is human language.

But useful AI work still needs taste, structure, feedback loops, and the nerve to make small useful things quickly.

Entrepreneurs AI Developer School teaches the practical stack: product truth, agent wrangling, advert writing, prototype loops, and shipping before the idea goes stale.

Build the thing. Explain the thing. Test the thing.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to school.continuumkit.org.
takes.title: AI Developer School - Docs To Demo 30s

takes.speaker: advert_voice
takes.text:
The new programming language is human language.

That does not mean the work is easy. It means the founder skill has changed.

Entrepreneurs AI Developer School is a practical course for people who want to build products, adverts, workflows, and prototypes with AI agents.

You learn how to turn a messy idea into product truth. How to brief an agent. How to judge the work. How to make fast adverts. How to build feedback loops. How to ship a rough version before the energy disappears.

This is not about pretending AI is magic. It is about becoming the person who can point it at a real opportunity and keep it honest long enough to make something useful.

Entrepreneurs AI Developer School.

Wrangle the agents. Build the business.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to school.continuumkit.org.
takes.title: AI Developer School - Agent Wrangler 60s

takes.speaker: advert_voice
takes.text:
The new programming language is human language.

Wrangle the agents. Build the business.

Build it. Explain it. Test it. Sell it.

Entrepreneurs AI Developer School.

takes.speaker: advert_voice
takes.text:
Some people do not have a lack of ideas. They have too many ideas arriving sideways.

Continuum Kit is for builders with brilliant, leaky, high-speed brains: people who need a way to capture the thread, recover the context, and keep moving without turning life into admin.

It is not a finished one-click product yet. It is a practical workflow being extracted from real use.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to continuumkit.org.
takes.title: Continuum - Brain Like A Sieve 30s

takes.speaker: advert_voice
takes.text:
If your brain makes connections faster than your systems can hold them, you do not need another productivity religion.

You need a way back into the work.

Continuum Kit is a public-safe path out of a private AI workflow: capture, context, agents, decisions, and next actions in language that belongs to you.

For people who think in storms and still need to ship.

Go to continuumkit.org.
takes.title: Continuum - Genius Chaos 30s

takes.speaker: advert_voice
takes.text:
Context lost? Thread gone? Brain moved on?

Continuum Kit is about building a workflow that helps you and your agents find the work again.

Capture the thread. Recover the context. Keep moving.

Go to continuumkit.org.
takes.title: Continuum - Context Recovery 15s

takes.speaker: advert_voice
takes.text:
Teams. Puzzles. Questionable materials. A final race that should probably have had more planning.

Jury Rigged is a new challenge-show concept where crews earn advantages, find hidden parts, build ridiculous solutions, and try to get across the water with dignity mostly intact.

It is part game show, part boatyard experiment, part pirate homework.

Jury Rigged.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to juryrigged.continuumkit.org.
